name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

(* Invariant: No two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ ~(r \in readers)
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
              /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
              /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in readers : /\ ~(r \in readers')
              /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks'[j] = clocks[j] + offsets[j]
          /\ offsets'[j] = offsets[j] + (Avg - clocks[j])
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        /\ turn' = 1 - turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
